nodes.label: ADR 006 — Mercado Pago Perú Payment Gateway
nodes.rationale: Accepts USD and PEN (Culqi only PEN), up to 12 installments with LATAM cards, mature Node SDK, robust webhook with x-idempotency-key, lower commission (4.59%+IGV vs Culqi 4.99%+IGV). Trade-off: UX is MP-branded, not white-label. Reconsidered if expanding to other LATAM countries or requiring white-label.
